title: Reusable model CLI dogfooding harness
goal: Create a reusable model-CLI dogfooding harness that can run Copilot/Haiku and later CLIs against disposable Agentic Workspace scenarios.
non_goals: Do not build a full benchmark dashboard in this slice.
Do not require executing paid model calls during normal validation.
Do not bake Copilot-specific behavior into the core harness format.

intent.outcome: Provide a reusable harness contract, runner, and first Copilot adapter configuration for black-box workflow dogfooding.
intent.constraints: Keep the runner dry-run by default and isolate execution in scratch fixtures.
intent.latitude: Choose simple JSON config and script shape that is easy to extend to other model CLIs.
intent.escalation: Stop before adding product runtime dependencies or automatic issue creation.

execution.next_step: Commit and push the harness scaffold.
execution.proof: Run focused tests for the harness plus planning surface checks.

invariants: Harness execution must default to dry-run.
Scenario repos must be copied into scratch before execution.
Adapter commands must be data-driven so non-Copilot CLIs can be added later.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Use external model CLIs as black-box package dogfooding probes so weaker/cheaper agents reveal workflow ambiguity early.

iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

intent_interpretation.literal request: Draw up a test harness that can be reused for other models and CLIs.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Create a practical, reusable harness design and first scaffold for Copilot/Haiku black-box workflow evaluation.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add a JSON-configured runner, Copilot suite example, documentation, and dry-run tests.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: docs/maintainer/, tools/model-cli-harness/, scripts/model_cli_harness/, tests/, active planning closeout
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_model_cli_harness.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Adding a persistent benchmark database, CI integration, or product CLI command.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Package runtime behavior, generated CLI adapters, or unrelated docs.

context_budget.tiny resumability note: Implement docs/config/runner/tests for model CLI harness; keep execution dry-run by default.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Create a reusable model CLI dogfooding harness.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dry-run by default; disposable fixtures; adapter-neutral core.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: File layout, config fields, prompt template, and dry-run proof.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The harness needs to run paid model calls or mutate real repos during proof.

active_milestone.scope: Add the first reusable model CLI dogfooding harness scaffold.

immediate_next_action: Add docs, config, runner, and dry-run tests for reusable model CLI dogfooding.
invariants: Scenario repos are copied into scratch before execution.
completion_criteria: Reusable model CLI dogfooding harness is implemented, validated, and closed out honestly.

execution_run.what happened: Added a reusable model CLI dogfooding harness with Copilot adapter config, disposable fixtures, dry-run runner, maintainer docs, and unit tests.
execution_run.changed surfaces: new harness script, suite config, fixtures, docs, tests, and planning archive
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_model_cli_harness.py -q; ruff check; dry-run harness command; planning surface checker; make check
execution_run.result for continuation: harness scaffold ready; execute-mode runs can be performed intentionally with --execute

finished_run_review.config compliance: used checked-in planning and archived closeout
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; no external model calls were run in validation
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: run execute-mode Copilot/Haiku scenarios manually when ready

proof_report.validation proof: make check passed; focused harness tests and lint passed; dry-run harness rendered a Copilot command and copied a disposable fixture.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: make check exited 0 after harness changes.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Draw up a test harness that can be reused for other models and CLIs.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Added adapter-neutral suite format, Copilot adapter, reusable runner, fixtures, docs, and tests.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Reusable model CLI harness scaffold delivered.
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: manual execute-mode dogfooding run when desired

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The reusable scaffold exists and is validated without requiring paid model execution.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: docs, runner, fixtures, suite config, tests, and make check output.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Need to automate scoring, add new adapters, or execute and analyze real Copilot/Haiku runs.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
